query: SELECT ar.id as req_id, ar.actionId, a.id as action_actual_id FROM adjustment_requests ar LEFT JOIN actions a ON ar.actionId = a.id WHERE a.id IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT ar.id as req_id, ar.actionId, a.id as action_actual_id FROM adjustment_requests ar LEFT JOIN actions a ON ar.actionId = a.id WHERE a.id IS NULL;
